diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I'm thinking about linking my account to my PlayStation. What happens to my progress if I do that?
[Agent] Great question. Genshin Impact supports cross-platform progress — your UID, characters, Adventure Rank, Primogems, and everything else stay tied to your HoYoverse account, not to the device. Once you link a platform like PlayStation, Apple, or another HoYoverse-supported login, you can play the same save file on any supported platform.
[Caller] Does it matter which one I link first?
[Agent] Not for progress, no. But keep in mind that some purchases, like Genesis Crystals bought on PlayStation, stay on PlayStation and can't be used on mobile or PC. The in-game characters and Primogems from gameplay are shared, but platform-bought currency is platform-specific.
[Caller] Okay, that makes sense. And is the linking reversible?
[Agent] You can unlink a platform, but there are cooldown periods. For specific timing and steps, I'd recommend our Account Linking help page, which walks through it screen-by-screen.
[Caller] Great, thanks.
[Agent] My pleasure. Anything else I can help with?
[Caller] No, I'm set.
[Agent] Enjoy your adventures in Teyvat!
